input_text: Nak claim maternity benefit pun susah. Borang banyak, proses lama. Ibu baru bersalin kena deal dengan birokrasi pulak.
reason: Difficult maternity benefit claims adding bureaucratic stress to new mothers.
suggested_rewrite: Proses tuntutan faedah bersalin perlu dipermudahkan. Permohonan dalam talian dan pemprosesan automatik boleh mengurangkan beban ibu baru.

input_text: The flood relief center has no proper food or bedding. Victims sleeping on the floor with just a blanket. This is how we treat displaced people?
reason: Inadequate flood relief center conditions, questioning treatment of disaster victims.
suggested_rewrite: Flood relief centers should meet minimum standards for food, bedding, and hygiene. Volunteer organizations and government agencies should coordinate better preparedness.

input_text: 每次去诊所都被推销保健品。医生到底是治病还是做生意？
reason: Clinic doctor pushing supplements instead of proper treatment, commercialization of healthcare.
suggested_rewrite: 医生应以患者健康为首要考虑。如果感觉被过度推销保健品，可以向医药理事会投诉。

input_text: Parking lot never got covered spaces but rains every day. Come back to car drenched inside because window seal broken from sun damage.
reason: Uncovered parking lots causing vehicle damage from weather exposure.
suggested_rewrite: Covered parking should be a standard feature in tropical climate buildings. Raise this at the building management meeting.

input_text: இந்த பகுதியில் குழந்தைகளுக்கான நூலகம் இல்லை. படிக்க ஆர்வம் உள்ள குழந்தைகள் எங்கு செல்வார்கள்?
reason: No children's library in the area, limiting young readers' access to books.
suggested_rewrite: குழந்தைகளுக்கான நூலக வசதிகள் அனைத்து பகுதிகளிலும் இருக்க வேண்டும். நடமாடும் நூலக சேவைகள் இதற்கு தீர்வாக அமையலாம்.

input_text: Dah la parking kat sekolah takde, jalan depan sekolah pun sempit. Double parking merata. Bahaya untuk budak-budak.
reason: No school parking with narrow roads and double parking endangering children.
suggested_rewrite: Keselamatan zon sekolah memerlukan perancangan trafik yang baik termasuk zon penurunan pelajar dan pengawal lalu lintas semasa waktu puncak.

input_text: My new apartment flooring makes creaking sounds everywhere. Developer says it's 'normal settling'. RM500k for a noisy floor?
reason: Expensive new apartment with creaking floors dismissed by developer as normal.
suggested_rewrite: Excessive floor creaking in a new apartment may be a construction defect. Get an independent assessment and file a claim during the defect liability period.

input_text: 为什么这个城市的公共WiFi速度这么慢？宣传说是免费高速WiFi，结果连网页都打不开。
reason: Advertised free high-speed public WiFi too slow to load web pages.
suggested_rewrite: 公共WiFi的实际速度应符合宣传标准。向提供服务的机构反馈使用体验有助于改善服务。

input_text: Kerja kat plantation memang teruk. Gaji rendah, rumah buruk, takde kemudahan asas. Macam zaman penjajah.
reason: Plantation working conditions compared to colonial era, exploitation concern.
suggested_rewrite: Keadaan pekerja ladang perlu dipantau dan ditambah baik mengikut piawaian Akta Kerja. Pekerja boleh mendapatkan bantuan JTK untuk menegakkan hak mereka.

input_text: Bought furniture from online store, arrived totally different from the picture. Seller blocked me when I asked for refund. Scam culture.
reason: Online furniture scam with product mismatch and seller ghosting, refund refusal.
suggested_rewrite: Keep screenshots of listings and conversations as evidence. File complaints with the e-commerce platform and KPDNHEP for investigation.

input_text: Nak bawak kereta masuk workshop ASO pun kena tunggu 2 minggu. Kereta rosak macam mana nak pergi kerja selama 2 minggu?
reason: Two-week wait for authorized service center, impacting work commute.
suggested_rewrite: Pusat servis kenderaan perlu menyediakan kapasiti yang mencukupi. Pertimbangkan bengkel lain yang dibenarkan di bawah waranti jika masa menunggu terlalu lama.

input_text: 这个小区的保安让陌生人随便进出。根本没有安全感。出事了谁负责？
reason: Security allowing strangers free entry to residential area, safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: 居民区的保安应严格执行访客管理制度。在业主大会上提出加强安保措施的要求。

input_text: Government scholarship dah lama tak review. Jumlah masih sama macam 10 tahun lepas tapi kos hidup dah berlipat ganda.
reason: Government scholarship amounts unchanged for decade despite doubled cost of living.
suggested_rewrite: Nilai biasiswa kerajaan perlu disemak berkala untuk mengikut kenaikan kos sara hidup. Cadangan boleh dikemukakan melalui wakil pelajar.

input_text: Outdoor gym equipment in the park all seized up from rust. Cannot use any of them. Just wasting space.
reason: Rusted outdoor gym equipment completely unusable, waste of public space.
suggested_rewrite: Report rusted fitness equipment to the parks department. Stainless steel equipment designed for tropical climate would last longer.

input_text: Dah berapa kali complaint rumah PPR bocor. Orang datang tengok je, tak repair. Tahun depan complaint lagi, tahun depan datang tengok lagi.
reason: Repeated PPR housing leak complaints with only inspections but no repairs.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan berulang yang tidak diselesaikan boleh dieskalasi kepada Jabatan Perumahan Negara. Simpan semua rekod aduan sebagai bukti.

input_text: 这些餐厅用的食用油颜色都变黑了还不换。顾客的健康他们完全不在乎。
reason: Restaurants using darkened cooking oil endangering customer health.
suggested_rewrite: 多次使用的食用油含有有害物质。如果发现餐厅使用变黑的油，可以向卫生部门举报。

input_text: Anak aku kena buli cyber kat sekolah tapi cikgu cakap itu hal luar sekolah. Siapa nak tolong budak ni?
reason: School dismissing cyberbullying as outside their responsibility, child protection gap.
suggested_rewrite: Buli siber terhadap pelajar perlu ditangani oleh sekolah dan polis. Laporkan kepada CyberSecurity Malaysia melalui talian aduan untuk bantuan.

input_text: Bus fare keeps increasing but service getting worse. More crowded, more delays, less routes. Opposite of what public transport should be.
reason: Bus fare-to-service ratio worsening with crowding, delays, and route cuts.
suggested_rewrite: Public transport fares should reflect service quality. Feedback through the operator's channels and APAD can push for service improvements.

input_text: Kat kampung aku, posmen hantar surat seminggu sekali je. Bil air datang dah lepas tarikh bayar. Kena penalti pulak.
reason: Rural mail delivery only weekly causing bills to arrive past due date with penalties.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan pos di kawasan luar bandar perlu lebih kerap. Daftar untuk bil elektronik supaya tidak terlepas tarikh akhir pembayaran.

input_text: கல்வி அமைச்சகம் ஆசிரியர்களுக்கு போதுமான பயிற்சி அளிப்பதில்லை. பழைய முறையிலேயே கற்பிக்கிறார்கள்.
reason: Education ministry not providing adequate teacher training, outdated teaching methods.
suggested_rewrite: ஆசிரியர் பயிற்சி நிகழ்ச்சிகள் நவீன கல்வி முறைகளை உள்ளடக்கியதாக இருக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Tenancy agreement berat sebelah. Semua clause protect landlord. Tenant punya rights macam tak wujud.
reason: One-sided tenancy agreements favoring landlords with no tenant protections.
suggested_rewrite: Satu akta sewaan yang komprehensif diperlukan di Malaysia untuk melindungi hak penyewa dan tuan rumah secara seimbang.

input_text: The new highway flyover blocks all natural light to the houses below. Property value dropped significantly. No compensation given.
reason: Highway flyover blocking light and reducing property values with no compensation.
suggested_rewrite: Residents affected by infrastructure projects may be entitled to compensation. Consult a lawyer about your rights under land acquisition and planning laws.

input_text: 每次去修车都被坑。换了不需要换的零件。女性车主更容易被宰。
reason: Car workshops replacing unnecessary parts, especially targeting female car owners.
suggested_rewrite: 所有车主应在维修前要求详细解释和书面报价。如怀疑不必要的维修，寻求第二意见。

input_text: Stesen bas ni takde CCTV langsung. Kes curi beg selalu berlaku tapi bukti takde. Macam mana nak tangkap pencuri?
reason: Bus station without CCTV enabling frequent bag theft with no evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Stesen bas awam perlu dilengkapi CCTV untuk keselamatan pengguna. Ini adalah pelaburan yang penting untuk mengurangkan jenayah.

input_text: Childcare so expensive in Malaysia. Both parents have to work but can't afford childcare. Catch-22 situation for young families.
reason: Childcare affordability crisis for dual-income families, work-family balance.
suggested_rewrite: Affordable childcare is essential for working families. Government subsidies for childcare or workplace nurseries would help young parents balance work and family.

input_text: Bas kilang bawak pekerja macam bawak kambing. Duduk atas lantai, takde seatbelt. Kalau accident mesti ramai mati.
reason: Factory buses dangerously overloaded with workers sitting on floor without seatbelts.
suggested_rewrite: Pengangkutan pekerja kilang mesti mematuhi piawaian keselamatan jalan raya. Laporkan bas yang melebihi kapasiti kepada JPJ.

input_text: 这些二手车商把里程表倒回去再卖。消费者被骗了还不知道。
reason: Used car dealers rolling back odometers to deceive buyers.
suggested_rewrite: 购买二手车时应独立检查车辆历史和里程记录。里程表篡改是犯罪行为，可以向KPDNHEP举报。

input_text: Kerajaan kutip zakat berjuta-juta tapi asnaf masih miskin. Pengurusan zakat pun ada masalah agaknya.
reason: Questioning zakat management effectiveness with millions collected but asnaf still poor.
suggested_rewrite: Pengurusan dana zakat memerlukan ketelusan dan keberkesanan. Pusat zakat negeri perlu menerbitkan laporan terperinci tentang pengagihan dana.

input_text: Local council planted trees but never water or maintain them. All dead within months. Wasted taxpayer money.
reason: Council-planted trees dying from lack of maintenance, wasteful spending.
suggested_rewrite: Tree planting programs should include maintenance schedules. Report dead or dying municipal trees to the landscaping department for replacement and proper care.

input_text: Rumah sewa makin mahal tapi landlord tak maintain pun. Dinding retak, paip bocor tapi suruh tenant repair sendiri.
reason: Rising rent with no maintenance from landlord, structural issues pushed to tenant.
suggested_rewrite: Penyelenggaraan struktural rumah sewa adalah tanggungjawab tuan rumah. Dokumentasikan semua kerosakan dan rujuk perjanjian sewa anda.

input_text: 这些建筑工地晚上施工噪音太大了。附近的居民都无法入睡。建筑公司完全不顾及他人。
reason: Construction site night noise preventing nearby residents from sleeping.
suggested_rewrite: 夜间施工噪音受地方法规限制。向市政厅和环境部门投诉并记录具体的施工时间和噪音情况。

input_text: Nak dapatkan salinan surat beranak pun ambil masa 3 minggu. Dalam era digital ni sepatutnya serta-merta je.
reason: Three-week wait for birth certificate copy in the digital age.
suggested_rewrite: Pengeluaran salinan dokumen rasmi boleh dipercepatkan dengan pendigitalan rekod. JPN perlu meningkatkan kecekapan pengeluaran dokumen.

input_text: This area has no pedestrian crossing for 2km. People have to cross a busy road with no traffic light. Accident waiting to happen.
reason: No pedestrian crossing for 2km forcing dangerous road crossings.
suggested_rewrite: A 2km stretch without a pedestrian crossing is a safety hazard. Request the local council to install a zebra crossing or traffic light at the busiest point.

input_text: இந்த பகுதியின் குடிநீர் குழாய் மிகவும் பழையது. நீர் கசிவு ஏற்படுகிறது. தினமும் நீர் வீணாகிறது.
reason: Old water pipes causing leaks and daily water wastage in the area.
suggested_rewrite: பழைய நீர் குழாய்களை மாற்றுவது நீர் வீணாவதை குறைக்கும். நீர் கசிவை உடனடியாக நீர் விநியோக நிறுவனத்திடம் புகார் செய்யவும்.

input_text: Kena saman RM150 sebab parking 5 minit kat yellow line. Tapi lori haram parking sehari suntuk takde kena apa. Pilih kasih.
reason: Fined for brief parking but illegal trucks unpunished, selective enforcement.
suggested_rewrite: Penguatkuasaan parking perlu konsisten untuk semua jenis kenderaan. Laporkan kenderaan yang menyalahi undang-undang melalui aplikasi PBT.

input_text: Air filter dah tukar baru pun air rumah masih kuning. Bukan masalah dalaman, memang water supply yang tercemar.
reason: Yellow tap water persisting despite new filter, water supply contamination.
suggested_rewrite: Air berwarna kuning menunjukkan masalah bekalan. Kumpulkan sampel dan laporkan kepada SPAN untuk ujian kualiti air.

input_text: Multi-storey car park built by government already crumbling. Concrete falling on cars. Building was just completed 3 years ago.
reason: New government car park structurally failing within 3 years, construction quality scandal.
suggested_rewrite: Structural failure of a 3-year-old building warrants investigation. Report to JKR and the local council. Engineering assessments should determine if it's safe to use.

input_text: 每到雨季路面就积水。这个排水系统设计完全不合理。每年都说要改善但从未改善。
reason: Drainage system failing every rainy season with annual unfulfilled improvement promises.
suggested_rewrite: 每年重复的积水问题需要系统性的排水改造。居民可以联合向地方政府提出正式请愿。

input_text: Harga tiket wayang makin naik. Dulu RM10 sekarang RM25. Hiburan pun dah jadi barang mewah.
reason: Cinema ticket prices making entertainment a luxury, cost of living indicator.
suggested_rewrite: Kos hiburan yang meningkat memang membimbangkan. Pertimbangkan tawaran diskaun hari tertentu atau perkhidmatan penstriman sebagai alternatif lebih mampu.

input_text: Nobody enforces no-smoking areas in restaurants. Second-hand smoke while eating is so common. What's the point of the law?
reason: No enforcement of smoking bans in restaurants exposing diners to second-hand smoke.
suggested_rewrite: Report restaurants violating no-smoking laws to the Ministry of Health. Consistent enforcement and penalties would make smoke-free dining a reality.

input_text: Tempat letak sampah besar kat hujung jalan ni dah penuh melimpah. Kutipan sampah lambat. Bau merata.
reason: Overflowing garbage bins at street end with delayed collection.
suggested_rewrite: Tong sampah yang melimpah perlu dilaporkan kepada SWCorp untuk kutipan segera. Penambahan kekerapan kutipan di kawasan berkepadatan tinggi diperlukan.

input_text: 为什么公共健身设施那么少？很多人想运动但没有免费的场地。
reason: Lack of public fitness facilities limiting exercise opportunities for the public.
suggested_rewrite: 更多的公共健身设施有助于全民健康。市民可以向地方政府建议在公园增设运动器材。

input_text: Nak register syarikat baru pun kena tunggu sebulan. Orang luar negara buat dalam satu hari je. Kita ketinggalan jauh.
reason: One-month company registration vs one-day in other countries, competitiveness concern.
suggested_rewrite: Proses pendaftaran syarikat boleh dipermudah dan dipercepatkan melalui pendigitalan sepenuhnya. SSM boleh belajar daripada amalan terbaik negara lain.
